action.command:
python -c "
import torch
ckpt = torch.load('checkpoints/final_epoch_20.pt', map_location='cpu')
print('Keys:', list(ckpt.keys()))
print('Args:', ckpt.get('args', {}))
sd = ckpt['model_state_dict']
keys = list(sd.keys())
print('First 3:', keys[:3])
print('Last 3:', keys[-3:])
print('Val acc:', ckpt.get('val_acc', 'N/A'))
"
